metadata.ansatz: shared flexible SU(N) Chebyshev spectral impurity
metadata.hamiltonian: -1/2 Delta_X + 1/2 omega^2 Tr X^2 + g Tr X^4

sampler.algorithm: scrambled Sobol Gaussian importance sampling in orthonormal traceless eigenvalue coordinates

training_samples.method: fixed-proposal Adam on the full flexible ansatz
training_samples.loss_history_description: Per-step fixed-proposal Rayleigh quotient evaluated before the Adam update.  Full observable diagnostics are stored separately in the candidate history on report steps, including the virial residual and its Tr X^2, Tr X^4, and kinetic ingredients.

training.method: fixed-proposal Adam on the full flexible ansatz
training.loss_history_description: Per-step fixed-proposal Rayleigh quotient evaluated before the Adam update.  Full observable diagnostics are stored separately in the candidate history on report steps, including the virial residual and its Tr X^2, Tr X^4, and kinetic ingredients.

training.method: fixed-proposal Adam on the full flexible ansatz
training.loss_history_description: Per-step fixed-proposal Rayleigh quotient evaluated before the Adam update.  Full observable diagnostics are stored separately in the candidate history on report steps, including the virial residual and its Tr X^2, Tr X^4, and kinetic ingredients.

evaluations.proposal: scrambled Sobol Gaussian in traceless coordinates
scrambled Sobol Gaussian in traceless coordinates

profile_slices.description: One-dimensional slices of q_i(lambda) through SU(4) traceless eigenvalue space. q_normalized is divided by the deterministic grid adjoint-profile norm for this candidate.

normalization_grid.type: midpoint tensor grid in three traceless coordinates

validation_summary.note: The SU(2)/SU(3) radial finite-difference energies are external benchmarks only.  Training and evaluation use the same flexible Chebyshev ansatz and Sobol-Gaussian importance Monte Carlo estimator for every N.
